quiz.title: Photosynthesis is a biological process. Light reactions occu
quiz.extractedText: Photosynthesis is a biological process. Light reactions occur in chloroplasts. Calvin cycle converts carbon dioxide into glucose. Oxygen is released. Different plants adapted different pathways. C3 plants are common in temperate regions because they photosynthesize efficiently. C4 plants thrive in hot conditions since they concentrate CO2. CAM plants survive in deserts because they open stomata at night only.

easy.content: Based on the text, what can be inferred about why "they open stomata at night"?
options: The text contradicts this idea
It is explicitly stated in the text
CAM plants survive in deserts
It has no connection to the main topic
easy.explanation: The text suggests that they open stomata at night leads to cam plants survive in deserts

easy.content: According to the text, what distinguishes "Photosynthesis" from "Light"?
options: The text treats them as identical
There is no meaningful distinction
Term1 is more important than Term2
Different characteristics and applications
easy.explanation: The text distinguishes between Photosynthesis and Light by discussing their different characteristics
